metadata.name: Cached Defenses bolsters the creature with the least toughness
metadata.description: P1 controls three creatures with distinct toughnesses: Llanowar Elves (1/1, toughness 1), Bog Raiders (2/2, toughness 2), and Wall of Omens (0/4, toughness 4). P1 casts Cached Defenses ({2}{G}, Bolster 3). Per CR 701.39a, Bolster 3 places 3 +1/+1 counters on the creature with the least toughness among creatures P1 controls — Llanowar Elves (toughness 1). After resolution, Llanowar Elves has 3 +1/+1 counters and is effectively a 4/4. Bog Raiders and Wall of Omens are unchanged.
metadata.generation_notes: Cached Defenses oracle text: 'Bolster 3. (Choose a creature with the least toughness among creatures you control and put three +1/+1 counters on it.)' CardDefinition verified at crates/engine/src/cards/defs/cached_defenses.rs using Effect::Bolster { player: Controller, count: Fixed(3) }. CR 701.39a: 'Bolster N means Choose a creature you control with the least toughness or tied for least toughness among creatures you control. Put N +1/+1 counters on that creature.' Three creatures have distinct toughnesses: 1 (Llanowar Elves), 2 (Bog Raiders), 4 (Wall of Omens) — no tie, so the target is unambiguous. Llanowar Elves (1/1 base) receives 3 +1/+1 counters and becomes 4/4. Mana: Cached Defenses costs {2}{G}; p1 has colorless:2 + green:1 pre-loaded. Bolster does not target — the creature is chosen on resolution (Scryfall ruling 2014-11-24: 'You determine which creature to put counters on as the spell or ability that instructs you to bolster resolves.'). Monastery Swiftspear was intentionally avoided — its Prowess ability triggers off non-creature spells and would add a second item to the stack on cast. Bog Raiders (2/2, Swampwalk) has no triggered abilities that fire off non-creature spells. All three creatures are in the Available Cards list. No SBA check needed — no creature dies or has 0 toughness.

script.step_note: P1 casts Cached Defenses (Bolster 3). On resolution, the creature with the least toughness among P1's creatures — Llanowar Elves (toughness 1) — receives 3 +1/+1 counters and becomes a 4/4.

actions.description: Initial: P1 controls 3 creatures (Llanowar Elves 1/1, Bog Raiders 2/2, Wall of Omens 0/4); Cached Defenses in hand; stack empty
actions.note: Three creatures with distinct toughnesses: 1, 2, 4. Llanowar Elves (toughness 1) has the lowest and will receive all 3 Bolster counters.
CR 601.2: P1 casts Cached Defenses from hand. Pays {2}{G} from the mana pool. No targets required — Bolster chooses on resolution, not at cast time (CR 701.39a). Card moves from hand to stack.

actions.description: After casting: Cached Defenses on stack, P1 hand empty, stack count 1
actions.note: Cached Defenses is on the stack awaiting resolution. None of P1's creatures (Llanowar Elves, Bog Raiders, Wall of Omens) have triggered abilities that fire off non-creature spells, so no extra triggers are added.
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority — top of stack resolves.

resolution.note: CR 701.39a: Bolster 3 — choose a creature P1 controls with the least toughness. Llanowar Elves has toughness 1 (least among 1, 2, 4). Place 3 +1/+1 counters on it. Per CR 121.1, each counter adds +1/+1. Llanowar Elves becomes a 4/4 (1/1 base + 3 counters).

actions.note: CR 608.2: Sorcery resolves. Effect::Bolster places 3 +1/+1 counters on Llanowar Elves (toughness 1, the least among P1's creatures). Cached Defenses moves to P1's graveyard after resolving.

actions.description: Final: Cached Defenses in graveyard; all 3 creatures still on battlefield; stack empty; life totals unchanged
actions.note: CR 701.39a: Llanowar Elves received the 3 +1/+1 counters (effective P/T 4/4 — 1/1 base plus 3 counters). Bog Raiders (toughness 2) and Wall of Omens (toughness 4) received no counters. No SBA checks needed — no creature has 0 or less toughness or lethal damage. Cached Defenses goes to graveyard per CR 608.2.
